metadata.description: Dev-Flow plugin marketplace — a six-phase role-playing development pipeline for Claude Code

plugins.name: dev-flow
plugins.description: A global development workflow orchestrator that enforces a six-phase role-playing pipeline: multi-persona product team discussion → PRD, tech lead decomposition → task breakdown, developer implementation → code, QA testing → test report, review board → merge/rework decision. Each phase pauses for user confirmation.
